page.title: Feature & Permission Management
page.subtitle: Enable/disable features and configure route access for each user role.

banner.title: Important Note
banner.message: Changing permissions will immediately affect user access. Child routes are automatically disabled if the parent route is turned off.

contentAccess.title: Content Access Structure
contentAccess.description: Simulate access control for educational materials by class and student group.

parentSpecial.title: Additive Parent Permissions
parentSpecial.description: Configure role-specific additive logic for parents.
parentSpecial.notesMessage: Sub-settings augment the parent settings but do not conflict. For example: allow viewing stats but restrict profile modifications.

viewOnly.title: Strict Stats Only Mode
viewOnly.description: Parents can only view their student's statistic routes.

contactTeacher.title: Additive: Basic Teacher Contact
contactTeacher.description: Allow sending quick messages to the responsible teacher.

autoAssign.title: Auto-assign Student Child Routes
autoAssign.description: Parents automatically gain 'View' permissions for student learning routes.

user-management.name: User Management & Analytics
user-management.description: Manage students, teachers, and view system statistics.

contests.name: Contests & Arena
contests.description: Coding contest system, ELO, and bot battles.

ai-features.name: AI Features & Personalization
ai-features.description: AI learning roadmaps, skill gap analysis, and smart recommendations.

content-access.name: Content Access Control
content-access.description: Manage resource access per class, teacher, and student.

webhooks.name: Webhooks & Reports
webhooks.description: Configure report webhooks and system notifications.

programming.name: Programming & Code
programming.description: IDE, Problem Library, and Solution Sharing.

social.name: Social & Community
social.description: Forum, Social Feed, and Study Groups.

parent-portal.name: Parent Portal
parent-portal.description: Track progress, reports, and teacher communication.

portfolio-builder.name: Portfolio Builder
portfolio-builder.description: Create professional portfolios for scholarships, internships, and admissions.

learning-autonomy.name: Learning Autonomy
learning-autonomy.description: Advanced analytics, time tracking, and SMART goal setting for students.

artifact-repo.name: Learning Artifacts
artifact-repo.description: Multimedia repository for project work and digital reflections.

intervention-dashboard.name: Intervention Dashboard
intervention-dashboard.description: Early warning dashboard and support workflows for at-risk students.

formative-assessment.name: Formative Assessment
formative-assessment.description: Swift assessment tools and real-time comprehension tracking.

curriculum-portal.name: Curriculum Information
curriculum-portal.description: Portal for parents to understand roadmaps and home support.

communication-hub.name: Communication Hub
communication-hub.description: Multimedia communication channel and periodic report storage.

rich-materials.name: Rich Multimedia Materials
rich-materials.description: Interactive video player, podcasts, and virtual labs.

admin-analytics.name: Behavioral & Effectiveness Analytics
admin-analytics.description: In-depth reporting system for user interaction and learning outcomes.

resource-optimization.name: Resource Optimization
resource-optimization.description: Tools for managing and allocating learning resources based on actual data.

audio-lessons.name: Podcast Lessons
audio-lessons.description: Flexible learning through audio and educational podcasts.

mind-maps.name: Mind Maps
mind-maps.description: Visualize knowledge through interactive mind maps.

micro-credentials.name: Micro-Credentials
micro-credentials.description: Badge system and skill certifications earned.

home-activities.name: Home Activities
home-activities.description: Activity library for parents to support student learning.

exit-tickets.name: Exit Tickets
exit-tickets.description: Quick end-of-class assessment tool to capture student understanding.

learning-path-templates.name: Learning Path Templates
learning-path-templates.description: Library of standardized personalized learning path templates.

iep-manager.name: IEP Manager
iep-manager.description: Digitize and manage Individualized Education Programs (IEP).

study-buddies.name: Study Buddies
study-buddies.description: Connect students with similar interests and learning goals to progress together.

skill-grouping.name: Skill Grouping
skill-grouping.description: Automatically group students by level and knowledge gaps for personalized support.

cohort-tracking.name: Cohort Tracking
cohort-tracking.description: Analyze and track the progress of student cohorts across multiple academic years.

tooltips.parentRoute: Parent Route: Disabling will disable all child routes.
tooltips.disabledByParent: No permission because parent route is disabled
